subject: A small grey-skinned goblin knight (redcap) wielding two curved bloody blades, mid-lunge in a rocky cave
description: A wiry grey-skinned goblin-sized humanoid in dark rust-red leather and tattered cloth charges forward through a cavernous rocky tunnel. He grips two curved short blades, both slick with fresh red blood that drips and trails as he swings. He wears a crude pointed red cap (the iconic redcap headgear) and his eyes are wide and feral. The cave walls are jagged warm-toned brown and red stone, lit from above with a hot reddish ambient glow that picks out the rocky texture and casts the figure in dramatic backlight. The composition is mid-shot, slightly low-angle, putting the viewer in the path of the charge.
foreground: redcap goblin knight charging forward with two bloody curved blades
background: rocky cavern walls with warm red ambient light
emotion: feral aggression, wide-eyed bloodlust, mid-charge fury
